steps.title: Find the subject and tense
steps.content: The subject of the verb is “she,” referring to Alice Coltrane. The surrounding verbs are present tense: she “switches” instruments and “creates” a sound. The blank needs a present-tense singular verb to match that structure.

steps.title: Eliminate agreement errors
steps.content: Choice A, “sweep,” does not agree with singular “she.” Choice B, “are sweeping,” also does not agree with “she.” Choice C, “were sweeping,” is plural and past tense. The singular present-tense verb matches “she switches” and “creates.” The answer is D.
